title: I Prayed So Eagerly
content:
I prayed so eagerly,
     �Turn and see
     How bitter I have striven-
     A word and all forgiven.�
     I prayed so eagerly.

     I prayed so eagerly-
     Not to be,
     You turned and passed.    Good-bye!
     Fates smile for me, dreamed I-
     Yet I prayed eagerly.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Dora Sigerson Shorter delivers a powerful performance in "I Prayed So Eagerly"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
